title: rhombolytrum rhomboideum
intro: Rhombolytrum rhomboideum, also known as Blue False Pansy, is a flowering plant in the grass family that is native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhombolytrum rhomboideum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas or infusions, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
